rationale.root_cause: They identified the FLAW at data = dataBadBuffer around line 33 and explained that the loop wrongly uses strlen(dest) to bound the copy, causing reads past the smaller source. This precisely describes the buffer over-read mechanism in this file.
rationale.local_fix: They bound the read by using strlen(data) and clamping to sizeof(dest)-1, then explicitly NUL-terminating dest. This prevents reading past the source buffer length.
rationale.global_fix: They recommended passing explicit source and destination lengths (e.g., span/struct with ptr and len) and using min(src.len, dst.cap-1) instead of relying on NUL-terminated raw buffers.
